zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexander Comyn於大約1262年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵時，他的父親Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland46歲，母親Elizabeth de Quincy43歲。他於大約1277年與Joan Latimer結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他於1296年登記服兵役。他於1305年在蘇格蘭維托史爾被列為sheriff。他去世於1308年12月3日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾笛卡爾 迪爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alexander Comyn于大约1262年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵时，他的父亲Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland46岁，母亲Elizabeth de Quincy43岁。他于大约1277年与Joan Latimer结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他于1296年登记服兵役。他于1305年在苏格兰維托史爾被列为sheriff。他去世于1308年12月3日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾笛卡爾 迪爾。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexander Comyn was born about 1262, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, was 46 and his mother, Elizabeth de Quincy, was 43. He married Joan Latimer about 1277. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1296. In 1305, at the age of 44, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Wigtownshire, Scotland. He died before 3 December 1308, in his hometown, and was buried in Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alexander Comyn est né environ 1262, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Quincy, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Joan Latimer environ 1277. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1296. En 1305, à l’âge de 44 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Wigtownshire, Écosse. Il est décédé avant 3 décembre 1308, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alexander Comyn um 1262 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland 46 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Quincy 43. Er hat um 1277 Joan Latimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1296 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1305, als er 44 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff in Wigtownshire, Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb vor 3. Dezember 1308 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Comyn è nato il circa 1262 nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Quincy, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Joan Latimer circa 1277. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1296. Nel 1305, all'età di 44 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Wigtownshire, Scotland. Morì prima del 3 dicembre 1308, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Comynが約1262年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotlandは46歳，母Elizabeth de Quincyは43歳であった。約1277年にJoan Latimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1296年に兵役登録をした。1305年，44歳の時，スコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1308年12月3日以前に故郷で死去し，スコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアオルド ディールにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Comyn(이)가 대략 1262년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Quincy(은)는 43세였다. 그는 대략 1277년 Joan Latimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1296년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1305년, 44세의 나이로 그의 직업은 스컷랜드 위그타운실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1308년 12월 3일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 압르디실르 드 디어에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1262–before 3 December 1308: ойролцоогоор 1262 он–1308 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 3–наас өмнө
mn.Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: Old Deer, Coontie o Aiberdeen, Шотланд

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Comyn nasceu aproximadamente 1262, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Quincy, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Latimer aproximadamente 1277. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1296. Em 1305, com 44 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Wigtownshire, Scotland. Ele faleceu antes 3 de dezembro de 1308, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alexander Comyn родился около 1262 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Quincy, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Latimer около 1277 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. В 1296 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1305 году, в возрасте 44 лет, работал по профессии sheriff в местности вигтоуншир, Шотландия. Он умер перед 3 декабрь 1308 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности олд дир, абирдиншир, Шотландия.

sm.about 1262–before 3 December 1308: e tusa o le 1262–a'e le'I oo le 3 Tesema 1308
sm.from 1297 to 1305: mai le 1297 e o'o I le 1305

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alexander Comyn nació aproximadamente 1262, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Quincy, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Joan Latimer aproximadamente 1277. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1296. En 1305, a la edad de 44 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Wigtownshire, Scotland. Murió antes de 3 de diciembre de 1308, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.
